Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 89 

PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 

LABEL: Procedure Classification System/Nomenclature 

DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the schema used to categorize providers. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR Taxonomy 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = T-MSIS taxonomy code 
2 = Provider specialty code 
3 =
